backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Internet Computer actor, indicating no backend logic is required for the application.
feature_evidence.json: Machine-readable report documenting implemented audio-routing features, affected frontend files, related components, test requirements, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of key frontend source files describing their responsibilities, UI components, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining design tokens, light/dark theme variables, and base styles for the entire frontend.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app to the root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all context providers, initializes global state, and conditionally renders the main UI or full-screen visualization.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundAmbian: Empty placeholder file intended for a background ambiance selector component.
Popup UI for selecting background ambiance sounds with theme-adaptive styling, localization, and keyboard/escape handling.
frontend/src/components/DurationSelector: Theme-aware popup component allowing users to select session duration via a slider with localized labels and accessibility handling.
frontend/src/components/EmbeddedVisualiz: Empty placeholder file intended for an embedded visualization component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal footer component providing layout spacing and background styling, with content intentionally removed.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyCard.ts: Reusable card component that displays a frequency with title and description, provides play/stop controls, and optionally allows adding the frequency to a playlist with visual feedback.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyList.ts: File is empty or content was not provided, likely intended to render or manage a list of FrequencyCard components.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header component that shows buttons for language, theme, and background ambiance selection, adapting styles and labels based on the current visual theme and language.
frontend/src/components/KidsSleepSoundCa: Card component for kids sleep sounds that mirrors FrequencyCard behavior, with play/stop controls, optional playlist support, and localized sound titles.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: File is empty or content was not provided, likely meant to expose a language selection UI or wrapper component.
Popup component that lets users select the application language, handling keyboard dismissal, viewport-aware positioning, and theme-aware styling.
frontend/src/components/MainPlayer.tsx: Central audio player UI that controls playback, duration, playlist access, volume, and fullscreen visualization while adapting appearance to the active theme and language.
frontend/src/components/MoodSpace.tsx: Interactive mood selection screen that lets users choose a mood and then displays recommended sounds based on the selected mood, with localized text and visual effects.
frontend/src/components/PeacefulSoundCar: Renders a card UI for a peaceful sound with play/stop controls and optional add-to-playlist action, including temporary checkmark feedback and localization support.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPanel.ts: File content not provided; likely responsible for displaying and managing the main playlist panel UI.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPopup.ts: Implements a themed modal popup for viewing and controlling the active playlist, handling outside clicks, ESC key, playback actions, and localized item names.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedSound: Displays mood-based recommended frequencies or sounds with actions to play immediately, add to playlist, or start a session, integrating player, session, and playlist managers.
frontend/src/components/SessionPanel.tsx: File content not provided; likely manages UI for active frequency or sound sessions.
frontend/src/components/SoundWaveVisuali: Renders a full-screen canvas visualization with animated circular wave effects that adapt to the current frequency, theme, and visual intensity.
Provides a dynamic themed background with images, animated gradients, and audio-synchronized pulse effects based on the selected visual theme and intensity.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelector.ts: File content not provided; likely allows users to choose between available visual themes.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorPop: Popup component that lets users select a visual theme, applies theme-specific Tailwind styles, handles Escape key closing, and localizes the title based on detected language.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedFrequency: Main browsing component that displays frequencies, kids sleep sounds, peaceful sounds, and mood space, coordinating playback with player, session, playlist, visualization, and theme styling.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPlaylistP: Empty or placeholder file with no implementation shown, likely intended for managing or displaying unified playlists.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedSessionPa: UI panel for starting, monitoring, pausing, resuming, and stopping predefined audio sessions, showing progress, remaining time, and localized session labels.
frontend/src/hooks/UnifiedAudioManagerCo: React context and provider that exposes the unified audio manager API (play, stop, volume, state) and enforces usage within its provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches a backend actor using React Query, re-creating it when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioActivation.ts: Context and provider that unlocks Web Audio on first user interaction, plays a silent sound to activate audio, shows a visual indicator, and persists activation state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioManager.ts: Empty or unprovided implementation file, presumably intended to manage low-level audio playback logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundAmbiance: Context provider that manages looping background ambiance sounds with Web Audio API, persists selection, and fades ambiance in or out based on main player activity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, persisted identities, and detailed login status using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Implements a language context with persistence in localStorage and exposes a hook to access and change the current language and translations.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayer.tsx: Defines the main audio player context managing playback state, queues, play modes, repeat/shuffle, and a sleep timer for frequencies and sounds.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayerAudioSyn: Synchronizes MainPlayer state changes to the unified audio manager, ensuring play, pause, and stop actions trigger actual audio playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder indicating no backend queries are used and all logic is client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx: Provides a visual theme context with localStorage persistence and a hook to get and set the active UI theme.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManage: Manages audio playback via Web Audio API and optional Android native audio, supporting frequency oscillators, sounds, volume, and intensity analysis.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedPlaylistMan: Implements playlist management on top of MainPlayer, including adding/removing items, starting playlists, looping, and duration-based playback control.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedSessionMana: React hook that manages timed meditation sessions by sequencing frequency playback via the main player, handling start, stop, pause, resume, and predefined session configs.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisualization.tsx: Provides a React context and hook to manage visualization fullscreen state with persistence in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme variables, animations, utilities, and component styles for the app’s visual design.
frontend/src/lib/kidsSleepSounds.ts: Defines the KidsSleepSound interface and a categorized list of kids-friendly sleep and ambient sounds.
frontend/src/lib/moodRecommendations.ts: Maps mood types to recommended frequencies and sounds used for personalized mood-based playback suggestions.
frontend/src/lib/moods.ts: Defines available moods with identifiers, icon paths, and glow colors for the mood selection UI.
frontend/src/lib/peacefulSounds.ts: Exports a list of peaceful ambient sounds with IDs and translation keys for general relaxation use.
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Contains language definitions and a comprehensive typed translation schema with localized UI strings for multiple app features.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and imports global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, animations, breakpoints, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the overall project metadata and current state for FrequencyVerse, including schema/versioning, a high-level app summary, and a catalog of existing features. Details implemented capabilities such as unified playback state, sleep timer, mobile player UI, playlist/session management, localization, persistence, and minimal Internet Computer integration.
